name: Green Deck
description: +$2 per remaining Hand, +$1 per remaining Discard at end of round. No Interest

name: Magic Deck
description: Start run with the Crystal Ball Voucher and 2 copies of The Fool

name: Nebula Deck
description: Start run with the Telescope Voucher, -1 Consumable slot

name: Ghost Deck
description: Spectral Cards may appear in the shop, Start run with a Hex Card

name: Abandoned Deck
description: Start run with no Face Cards (Jacks, Queens, or Kings) in your deck

name: Checkered Deck
description: Start run with 26 Spades and 26 Hearts

name: Zodiac Deck
description: Start run with Tarot Merchant, Planet Merchant, and Overstock Vouchers

name: Anaglyph Deck
description: After defeating each Boss Blind, gain a Double Tag

name: Plasma Deck
description: Balance Chips and Mult when calculating score for played hand. 2x Base Blind size

name: Erratic Deck
description: All Ranks and Suits in deck are randomised
